---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in UnifyECS
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Configure backend '...'
2. Call '...'
3. Observe '...'

If possible, include a minimal code sample that reproduces the issue.

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
- .NET SDK runtime version: [e.g. 8.0.100]
- UnifyECS commit / version: [e.g. main @ abc123]
- Backend(s) affected: [e.g. Arch 2.1.0, Flecs 4.0.4, Friflo 1.3.2]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here (logs, screenshots, generated code, etc.).
